C

Cell - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Represents an individual cell within the Battleship game board.
Cell(Coordinate) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Constructs a new Cell at the specified coordinate with default state CellState.EMPTY.
CELL_SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ShipView
Standard grid cell dimension in pixels used for shape scaling.
CellState - Enum Class in com.example.battleship.model.enums
Represents the current state of a single cell on the Battleship grid.
changeScene(String) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.SceneManager
Loads a specified FXML layout file, attaches the global stylesheet, and sets it as the active scene.
chooseShotTarget() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.HumanPlayer
Chooses a target coordinate for firing a shot.
chooseShotTarget() - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.players.IPlayer
Determines and selects the next target coordinate for an attack action.
chooseShotTarget() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.MachinePlayer
Selects the next coordinate to attack based on the active shooting strategy.
chooseShotTarget() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.Player
Abstract method to choose the next target coordinate for an attack.
clearSavedGame() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Deletes existing save and summary files from disk upon game completion or reset.
Colors - Class in com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util
Utility color palette defining color constants for ship 2D vector rendering in JavaFX.
com.example.battleship - module com.example.battleship
Main module declaration for the Battleship game application.

Coordinate - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Represents an immutable 2D grid position on the Battleship board.
Coordinate(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate
Constructs a new Coordinate with validated row and column values.
create(double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships.AircraftCarrierShape
Creates a composite JavaFX Group representing the Aircraft Carrier.
create(double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships.DestroyerShape
Creates a composite JavaFX Group representing the Destroyer vessel.
create(double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships.FrigateShape
Creates a composite JavaFX Group representing the Frigate vessel.
create(double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships.SubmarineShape
Creates a composite JavaFX Group representing the Submarine vessel.
create(ShipType, Orientation, double) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
Creates and returns a transformed JavaFX Group representing the specified vessel.
createShip(ShipType, Orientation, List<Cell>) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.ShipFactory
Creates and returns a concrete Ship instance corresponding to the specified type.
